description: Install dependencies (next-themes, lucide-react), verify baseline build, and set up project foundation including data layer (lib/data.ts) and Tailwind v4 dark mode configuration.
steps: Install next-themes and lucide-react via npm: `npm install next-themes lucide-react`

Create lib/data.ts with a TypeScript interface for Snippet (id, title, description, category, code, language) and export an array of 4 mock snippets covering Splunk, React, AI/Python, and Bash categories

Update app/globals.css to support class-based dark mode with next-themes: add a custom dark variant using Tailwind v4's @custom-variant or @variant directive for .dark selector, and update the dark color scheme to use .dark class instead of @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark)
Run `npm run build` and `npm run lint` to verify everything compiles correctly
acceptance_criteria: next-themes and lucide-react appear in package.json dependencies
lib/data.ts exports a typed array of 4 snippet objects with all required fields
npm run build passes with no errors
npm run lint passes with no errors
